page_content:
Prerequisite: HDCC106 and HDCC105.

Restriction: Must be in the Digital Cultures and Creativity Honors College Living/Learning program.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

HDCC209 Capstone in Design Cultures and Creativity (3 Credits) Capstone for Design Cultures and Creativity in which students will develop their program capstone projects under the supervision of a faculty mentor, with regular checkpoints and presentations to track progress.
